---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new canonical skill, wave, validation rule, or repository capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

What do you want to add or improve?

## Type of request

- [ ] new canonical skill
- [ ] new canonical wave
- [ ] dedupe improvement
- [ ] provenance or license handling
- [ ] validation or CI
- [ ] documentation

## Why it matters

Explain the use case and expected impact.

## Proposed scope

Describe the expected files, domains, or workflows that would change.

## Source considerations

If this request is based on an upstream repository or skill, describe the source and license constraints.

## Additional context

Anything else that would help review the request.
